case_title: YIP LISA VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $322.65 FILED BY YIP LISA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
